attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRCT_VER_INF)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.BUDGET_VERSION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.VERSION_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.TASK_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.FORECAST_START_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.FORECAST_END_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.PROBABILITY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.SPREAD_CURVE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.CHANGE_REASON_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.COMMENTS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.BASELINED_BY_PERSON_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.BASELINED_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.SPREAD_AMOUNT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.VERSION_STATUS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.CURRENT_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.REV_RCGTN_METHOD, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.COPIED_FROM_VERSION, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.LAST_SUBMITTED_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.LAST_SUBMITTED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO,
(
select BUDGET_VERSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO
minus
select BUDGET_VERSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO
) ACM
where 
 ACM.BUDGET_VERSION_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.BUDGET_VERSION_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_REV_FRST_VR_INFO.REFRESH_DATETIME
